title: AI is KILLING your SaaS! Here's WHY. #shorts
summary: AI agents are evolving rapidly and pose a competitive threat to traditional SaaS businesses. The video discusses how companies need to adapt to survive in a changing AI-driven landscape.
writeup: This short argues that rapidly advancing AI agents represent a competitive threat to traditional SaaS businesses. It frames the shift as a structural change in the software landscape and references multi-agent systems as part of that pressure. The takeaway: companies that depend on conventional SaaS models will need to adapt to survive.
